# PDFShuffl

> PDFShuffl is a free, fast, privacy-friendly suite of browser-based PDF tools. Convert, edit, compress, merge, split, sign and organise PDF files online from any device — no installation or signup required.

PDFShuffl runs entirely in the browser. Files are processed securely and are not shared. The service is available worldwide, including geo-targeted landing pages for major countries and cities.

## Core tools

- [PDF Converter](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): PDF Converter online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to Word](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to Word online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert Word to PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert Word to PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to Excel](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to Excel online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert Excel to PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert Excel to PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to JPG](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to JPG online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert JPG to PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert JPG to PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to PNG](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to PNG online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PDF to PowerPoint](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PDF to PowerPoint online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Convert PowerPoint to PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Convert PowerPoint to PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Compress PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Compress PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Merge PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Merge PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Split PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Split PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Edit PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Edit PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Sign PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Sign PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Rotate PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Rotate PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Crop PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Crop PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Unlock PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Unlock PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [Protect PDF](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Protect PDF online — free, secure, no signup.
- [PDF to Text](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): PDF to Text online — free, secure, no signup.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://pdfshuffl.com/): Full PDF toolkit and uploader.
- [All tools](https://pdfshuffl.com/tools): Browse every PDF conversion and editing tool.
- [Articles](https://pdfshuffl.com/articles): Guides and how-tos for working with PDFs.
- [About](https://pdfshuffl.com/about): What PDFShuffl is and how it works.
- [Contact](https://pdfshuffl.com/contact): Get in touch with the PDFShuffl team.

## Machine-readable data

- [Tool registry (JSON)](https://pdfshuffl.com/api/tools.json): Machine-readable list of all PDFShuffl tools.
- [Sitemap index](https://pdfshuffl.com/sitemap-index.xml): All indexed pages.

_Indexed pages: 550,000 (PDF keyword pages + geo-targeted pages)._
